name: claw-kanban
tagline: A visual Kanban task board and complete SEO/EDM workflow suite for your OpenClaw agent.
description: Claw Kanban provides a real-time, visual Kanban board to track the tasks your OpenClaw agent is working on. See what's in progress, what's done, and what went wrong, all from a cloud-based web dashboard. It also includes a powerful suite of SEO and EDM skills (Keyword Research, Competitor Analysis, Email Campaigns, and Markdown-to-HTML generation) seamlessly integrated into the Kanban workflow.
acknowledgements: Contains modified SEO & GEO skills originally created by Aaron Zhu at https://github.com/aaron-he-zhu/seo-geo-claude-skills
